title: Turbo McMerrit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Turbo McMerrit''' was a [[Podracing/Legends|Podracer]] pilot who was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in a crash on [[Baroonda/Legends|Baroonda]] which scattered remains of his [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] over two square [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-06-27 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
